title: Enforce one Work Item per pull request

scenarioCoverage.scenario: one newly archived Work Item passes
multiple newly archived Work Items fail

riskAssessment.reason: A PR combining independent Work Items weakens review ownership and lifecycle closure.

executionDecision.reason: The PR validator has a clear migration boundary and regression strategy.

preReviewWarnings: Reject multiple new archive pairs while preserving historical aggregate compatibility.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A PR containing exactly one newly maintained Work Item archive pair passes.
A PR containing multiple newly maintained archive pairs fails closed.
Legacy aggregate archive fixtures remain readable for historical compatibility.
The one Work Item/branch/PR rule is documented.
guidelines: Fail closed on multiple newly maintained Work Items in one PR.

intent.problem: PR validation currently permits multiple newly archived Work Items in one PR, making review ownership and lifecycle closure ambiguous.
constraints: Do not reject immutable legacy aggregate evidence.
Use the archive sequence as the migration boundary.
intent.rationale: One Work Item per PR keeps scope, approval, archive evidence, and closure ownership unambiguous.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
